audit_items.proof_trace: transferForSwap (L321) executes unconditionally before the for-loop (L324) that contains s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp (L353). Both are gated on eligibleAssets.length > 0, and Solidity executes statements sequentially, so the ordering invariant holds by construction. The hasFeeAggregator=false path correctly skips transferForSwap because no external aggregator is present.
